data.title: Iran Offers Reply to US Peace Plan as Hormuz Crisis Rages On
data.description: Iran submitted its response to the latest US proposal to end 10 weeks of war as a series of incidents continues to threaten a shaky ceasefire.
data.keywords: Iran,War,Generic 1st 'CL' Future,Generic 1st 'NG' Future,Tehran,Qatar,United Arab Emirates,Donald John Trump,Washington,Middle East,politics
